title: Mookiee

'''Mookiee''', a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wokling/Legends|wokling]], lived on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon]] of [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Endor]] around the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="SWE" /> She came of age and received her hood—together with [[Malani]] and [[Gwig]]—at the [[Festival of Hoods]].<ref name="The Cries of the Trees">{{Ewoks|The Cries of the Trees}}</ref> She could often be seen playing with a wheeled animal toy.<ref name="SvS">{{Ewoks|Sunstar vs. Shadowstone}}</ref> She was named for a [[Mookiee (legend)|legendary huntress]] in Ewok mythology.<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Mookiee.jpg|thumb|left|Mookiee plush toy]]
Mookiee first appeared as one of six 8-inch plush woklings made by [[Kenner Products|Kenner]] as part of their ''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (toy line)|Return of the Jedi]]'' toy line<ref name="Scouting the Galaxy">{{InsiderCite|40|Scouting the Galaxy}}</ref>, then as a figure in their Kenner Preschool division's [[Wicket the Ewok (toy line)|''Wicket the Ewok'']] toy line. She is part of the Endor Woodland Wagon set with [[Paploo/Legends|Paploo]] and [[Latara/Legends|Latara]].<ref name="Kenner Wicket">{{KennerCite|set=Wicket the Ewok (toy line)|pack=Ewok Woodland Wagon|altlink=http://blog.theswca.com/2017/10/woktots-kenners-preschool-star-wars-toys.html}}</ref>

Though Mookiee has yet to be identified in the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] animated television show, two different [[Nelvana]] animation model sheets feature variations on a female character named "Mookie," [[Forum:SH:Revenge of the Ewoks cel model sheets|with]] and without<ref name="Mookie no hood">{{WebCite|url=https://www.pinterest.com/pin/513903007479833447|text=Star Wars Ewoks Cartoon Animation Production MOOKIE Model Cel #BV206|work=Pinterest|archivedate=20250404213840}}</ref> a hood, which matches characters appearing in some episodes. [[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded|''A Guide to the Star Wars Universe'']] and the ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' also refer to her as a character from that cartoon series.<ref name="SWE" />
